creator: op@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 148901
0001-HBSD-allow-to-specify-custom-keymap-to-kbdmux.patch

When kbdmux added to kernel config, it's override both ATKBD_DFLT_KEYMAP and UKBD_DFLT_KEYMAP.
The attached patch added new kernel config know: KBDMUX_DFLT_KEYMAP which allow to specify custom keymap.
